title: A man reports a long history of sightings and close encounters with UFOs in Igarapava [2000]

text_preview: NOV 28th, 2000. Time: 17h40pm. In the city of Igarapava, State of São Paulo, a witness (who asked for discretion) made a brief report to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] about his experience with UFO phenomena during eight (8) years. According to the witness, in this period he not only spotted unidentified flying objects, but also claimed to have had “close encounters” during the phenomena. The features of the UFOs described by this witness in the COMDABRA’s report depicted the UFOs in “various ways”, but specifying some shapes like the “cigar” shape and also the “spoon” shape UF
summary: In Nov 2000, an Igarapava-SP witness reported eight years of UFO sightings and claimed close encounters, describing cigar- and spoon-shaped objects, with photos and film.
